title: sabulina attica
intro: Sabulina attica, also known as rock rose or Cistus incanus, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its white or pink flowers and grayish-green leaves. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate circulation, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits, such as antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immune-boosting effects. In herbal preparations, Sabulina attica is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications, and is believed to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues.
